items.title: Long Run
items.description: Run 10 km at a pace of 6:30 min/km. Aim to keep your heart rate in Zone 2 (130-145 bpm).

items.title: Tempo Run
items.description: Run 6 km with 4 km at a pace of 5:45 min/km. Start with a 1 km warm-up at an easy pace (7:00 min/km) and finish with a 1 km cool down. Target heart rate during tempo segments should be in Zone 3 (145-160 bpm).

items.title: Easy Recovery Run
items.description: Run 5 km at a relaxed pace of 7:30 min/km. Keep your heart rate below 130 bpm to aid recovery.

items.title: Strength Training
items.description: Focus on full-body strength training for 45 minutes. Include exercises like squats, lunges, and deadlifts. Aim for 3 sets of 10-12 reps for each exercise.
